query:
DELETE FROM products; INSERT INTO products (asin, title, brand, category, metalType, price, originalPrice, rating, reviewCount, imageUrl, affiliateLink, description, isFeatured, isHero, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('B08KQMVXVL', 'PANDORA Sparkling Halo Ring', 'PANDORA', 'rings', 'sterling_silver', '129.99', '149.99', 4.8, 2341, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/P/B08KQMVXVL.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08KQMVXVL?tag=91791709-20', 'Sterling silver ring with sparkling cubic zirconia', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('B08L7QXQZJ', 'SWAROVSKI Attract Round Necklace', 'SWAROVSKI', 'necklaces', 'white_gold', '149.99', '189.99', 4.7, 1876, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/P/B08L7QXQZJ.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08L7QXQZJ?tag=91791709-20', 'White gold plated necklace with Swarovski crystals', 1, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('B07YKZQ8ZV', 'FOSSIL Harlow Gold-Tone Bracelet', 'FOSSIL', 'bracelets', 'gold', '99.99', '129.99', 4.6, 1234, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/P/B07YKZQ8ZV.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07YKZQ8ZV?tag=91791709-20', 'Gold-tone stainless steel bracelet', 1, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('B08QKXQVQZ', 'MICHAEL KORS Brilliance Earrings', 'MICHAEL KORS', 'earrings', 'rose_gold', '79.99', '99.99', 4.5, 987, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/P/B08QKXQVQZ.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08QKXQVQZ?tag=91791709-20', 'Rose gold plated stud earrings', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('B07Z5QXQXZ', 'GUESS Iconic Bracelet', 'GUESS', 'bracelets', 'sterling_silver', '69.99', '89.99', 4.4, 765, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/P/B07Z5QXQXZ.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07Z5QXQXZ?tag=91791709-20', 'Sterling silver link bracelet', 1, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('B08RKXQZQZ', 'TOMMY HILFIGER Gold Necklace', 'TOMMY HILFIGER', 'necklaces', 'gold', '89.99', '119.99', 4.6, 1543, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/P/B08RKXQZQZ.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08RKXQZQZ?tag=91791709-20', 'Gold-tone stainless steel necklace', 1, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('B07YQXQZQZ', 'SKAGEN Kariana Earrings', 'SKAGEN', 'earrings', 'white_gold', '99.99', '129.99', 4.7, 2103, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/P/B07YQXQZQZ.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07YQXQZQZ?tag=91791709-20', 'White gold plated drop earrings', 1, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('B08LKXQZQZ', 'EMPORIO ARMANI Ring', 'EMPORIO ARMANI', 'rings', 'sterling_silver', '149.99', '189.99', 4.8, 876, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/P/B08LKXQZQZ.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08LKXQZQZ?tag=91791709-20', 'Sterling silver band ring', 1, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('B07XQXQZQZ', 'CALVIN KLEIN Bracelet', 'CALVIN KLEIN', 'bracelets', 'rose_gold', '129.99', '169.99', 4.5, 654, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/P/B07XQXQZQZ.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07XQXQZQZ?tag=91791709-20', 'Rose gold plated bangle bracelet', 1, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('B08MKXQZQZ', 'CITIZEN Eco-Drive Pendant', 'CITIZEN', 'necklaces', 'white_gold', '119.99', '159.99', 4.6, 1432, 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/P/B08MKXQZQZ.jpg', 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08MKXQZQZ?tag=91791709-20', 'White gold plated pendant necklace', 1, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW());
